qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of the confirmation number obtained after submitting an Alliance Canadian Common CV (CCV)?
qa_pairs.answer: The confirmation number is mandatory to enter on the CCDB to link your Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) application with your CCV submission. It is important to note that only confirmation numbers for CCVs submitted using the Alliance template will be accepted.

qa_pairs.question: What information sections are mandatory when completing the Alliance Canadian Common CV (CCV) template?
qa_pairs.answer: When completing the Alliance CCV template, the mandatory sections are Personal Information (identification, correspondence language), Education (degrees), Employment (academic and non-academic work experience, affiliations, leaves of absence, and impact on research), and Research Funding History (funding over the last five years).

qa_pairs.question: Who is required to submit a Canadian Common CV (CCV) to renew their Alliance account, and what is the validity period for the submission?
qa_pairs.answer: Only users with Faculty and Adjunct Faculty roles are required to submit a CCV to renew their Alliance account. Submitting a CCV is optional for Emeritus Professors, Retired Faculty, and Librarians. To renew your account, your CCV must have been submitted within the last 300 days.
